name: zsh startup — Zellij subshell vs fresh shell

description: Baseline: current config + add hyperfine to packages

asi.note: p90_zellij_ms=1338 is a single cold-start outlier (1 of 7 runs); median 152ms is reliable. Fresh shell median 141ms slightly lower than zellij because MISE_SHELL causes the nested (faster) mise init to be bypassed in fresh — wait, that's backwards. Fresh unsets MISE_SHELL so it runs full mise init. p90_fresh=219ms also shows some jitter. Add a warmup run if p90s stay noisy.

description: Skip fnm subprocess in Zellij panes; source pre-built static shims instead

asi.hypothesis: fnm env --use-on-cd forks a subprocess and creates a new multishell dir (~27ms). In Zellij panes PATH+FNM_* are inherited so we only need the shell functions/alias.
asi.result: zellij: 152->126ms (-26ms, -17%). fresh: 141->155ms (expected: still runs full fnm eval). warmup run also fixed p90 outlier.
asi.mechanism: pre-built fnmZshInit nix derivation strips PATH/env exports; guarded by [[ -n $ZELLIJ ]]

asi.hypothesis: defer 3 eager plugins (~20ms combined) via zsh-defer to save startup time
asi.rollback_reason: build broke: fnmZshInit derivation runs `fnm env --use-on-cd` inside nix sandbox which has no HOME (/homeless-shelter), so fnm can't create its multishell dir. Also result 137ms vs 126ms prev-best is within noise (σ≈13ms from hyperfine). Two separate bugs.
asi.next_action_hint: Fix fnmZshInit to use pkgs.writeText with hand-written static shims (no execution needed). Then separately retry deferring the 3 plugins.
asi.key_insight: pkgs.runCommand cannot call tools that need $HOME at build time. Use pkgs.writeText for static content. Also: noise floor is ~13-20ms so small gains may not be measurable with RUNS=7.
